_comment: Manifest of llama.cpp CUDA tarballs that LMForge can download at init / engine install time. Built by .github/workflows/build-llamacpp-cuda.yml; sha256 values are filled in manually from each release's <tarball>.tar.gz.sha256 companion after the workflow runs (CI publishes the .sha256 file alongside the tarball). Embedded into the lmforge binary via include_str! in src/engine/variant.rs.
